name: مستوران
overview: The series narrates fascinating adventures and a combination of ancient Iranian stories such as "One Thousand and One Nights," "Kashkoul," "Golestan" and "Shahnameh", which took place in a city called "Mastooran" 500 years ago in Iran.

trailers.title: سریال مستوران - تیزر | Serial Mastooran - Teaser
